notice: This inventory is an engineering control, not legal advice.

records.title: Real club crests and mappings used by the web build
records.basis: No redistribution licence or written permission is recorded. Android and iOS exclude these files and use generic abbreviation crests.
records.distribution_decision: Keep the real crests in the web build under an explicit project-owner web-only risk exception. Android, iOS and the standalone legal-policy site exclude them.
records.risk_acknowledgement: The project owner explicitly accepts the unresolved copyright and trademark risk for web distribution. This exception is not a licence, permission or legal clearance.
records.evidence: Explicit project-owner direction recorded 2026-07-16: keep real crests on web and exclude them from Android.

records.title: Project-owned player source and copa.life model output
records.basis: The project owner declares the source data is independently held. Public/mobile output contains only six independently weighted 0–100 copa.life game dimensions and no raw 1–20 attributes.
records.evidence: Project owner provenance declaration recorded 2026-07-15; deterministic build: tools/build-copa-player-profiles.mjs

records.title: Real player identity and public sporting facts
records.basis: The project owner states the underlying dataset is independently held. Names, age and positions are treated as public sporting facts; game evaluations are explicitly presented as copa.life model outputs.

records.title: First-party country flag SVG set
records.basis: All bitmap and externally sourced implementations were removed. The seven compact SVG implementations were authored directly in the copa.life repository from geometric primitives and contain no imported artwork or metadata.
records.distribution_decision: Use the first-party SVG set in web, Android and iOS packages. Native checks allow only the approved SVG filenames and reject other files in assets/flags.
records.evidence: First-party SVG source committed in assets/flags on 2026-07-22; Android package allowlist enforced by tools/check-android-package.mjs and tools/CheckAndroidAab.java.
